name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
description: An initiative by the Government of India that provides up to ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to all landholding farmer families.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year directly transferred to the bank accounts of farmers.

eligibility.extra: Must own agricultural land. Exclusion criteria applies to high income/professional taxpayers.

name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: The largest health assurance scheme in the world, aiming to provide free health cover of up to ₹5 Lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
benefits: Cashless health insurance cover of up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year for hospitalization.

eligibility.extra: Identified households based on deprivation and occupational criteria in SECC 2011 database, or low income families below poverty line.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides loans up to ₹10 Lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. Divided into Shishu (up to ₹50k), Kishor (₹50k-₹5L), and Tarun (₹5L-₹10L) categories.
benefits: Collateral-free business loans up to ₹10,00,000 for starting or expanding micro-business units.

eligibility.extra: Any Indian citizen who has a business plan for a non-farm income-generating activity, such as manufacturing, processing, trading or service sector.

documents: Aadhaar Card / Voter ID / PAN Card

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
description: A small deposit scheme for a girl child, launched as part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign. Offers high-interest rates and tax benefits under Section 80C.
benefits: High compound interest rate (8.2%+), tax savings, and maturity funds reserved for the girl child's education or marriage.

eligibility.extra: Account can be opened by the natural or legal guardian for a girl child of age 10 years or below. Maximum of two accounts per family.

documents: Birth Certificate of the Girl Child
Passport size photos of child and guardian

name: PM Vidyalaxmi Education Loan Portal
description: A first-of-its-kind gateway for students seeking Education Loans. Students can view, apply and track education loan applications with multiple banks through a single form.
benefits: Single window access to education loans from 40+ banks, interest subsidy schemes, and flexible repayment options.

eligibility.extra: Must have secured admission to a higher education course in India or abroad through merit-based selection.

documents: Proof of Admission & Fee Structure from College
Aadhaar Card & PAN Card (Student and Co-borrower)
Income Certificate of parents / Co-borrower salary slips
Collateral security documents (for loans above ₹7.5 Lakhs)

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: A pension scheme focused on unorganized sector workers. Provides a guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after the age of 60, depending on contributions.
benefits: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension of up to ₹5,000 after reaching age 60.

eligibility.extra: Should not be a member of any statutory social security scheme and should not be an income tax payer.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Promotes entrepreneurship among women and Scheduled Castes (SC) or Scheduled Tribes (ST). Provides bank loans between ₹10 Lakh and ₹1 Crore for starting a greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Composite loans between ₹10 Lakhs and ₹1 Crore covering up to 75% of the project cost.

eligibility.extra: Specifically for Women or SC/ST entrepreneurs. Enterprise must be greenfield (first-time venture). In case of non-individual enterprise, 51% shareholding must be held by SC/ST/Women.

documents: Balance Sheets & Income Tax returns of promoters

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Skill certification scheme that aims to enable a large number of Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training that will help them secure a better livelihood.
benefits: Free skill training, assessment fees coverage, government-recognized skill certificate, and placement support.

eligibility.extra: Any school/college dropout or unemployed youth looking to upskill themselves. Aadhaar linkage is mandatory.
